31-reactive.errors.rip.why: the := lowering's satisfies guard — the second publish of the wrong-initializer double, mapped onto the annotation span; asserts the interim while the double-publish row is open (FINDINGS.md)
the ~= lowering's value-level second publish on the derivation expression; asserts the interim while the double-publish row is open (FINDINGS.md)

32-components.errors.rip.why: the ref-cell mismatch (an HTMLInputElement cell on a div) — rip-native: React's ref rejection fires for a different reason (a raw element is not a Ref shape), so the twin cannot honestly judge it; pinned per the components ruling (RULINGS.md)

the two-way bind mismatch (number state into a string prop) — no TSX line can spell the <=> channel; the container-typed message is the channel's real contract; pinned per the components ruling (RULINGS.md)
